rules.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter font-black text-[#0A0A0A]

layout_spacing.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen w-full md:w-[280px] bg-[#E94B1F] flex flex-col p-8 z-50

sidebar_nav.description: Orange vertical sidebar containing yellow pill buttons with shortcut numbers.
sidebar_nav.classes: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-[280px] bg-[#E94B1F] flex flex-col justify-between p-8 z-50
sidebar_nav.nav_item: flex items-center gap-4 w-full px-6 py-4 rounded-full bg-[#FFD93D] text-[#0A0A0A] font-bold text-sm hover:scale-105 transition-transform cursor-pointer shadow-sm mb-4
sidebar_nav.nav_shortcut: opacity-60 text-xs font-mono bg-[#0A0A0A]/10 px-2 py-1 rounded-full

pill_button.description: Yellow rounded pill button with black text.
pill_button.classes: px-8 py-4 rounded-full bg-[#FFD93D] text-[#0A0A0A] font-bold text-sm hover:bg-[#F3C721] transition-all inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 shadow-sm

status_badge.description: Available for project status with green dot.
status_badge.classes: inline-flex items-center gap-3 px-5 py-2.5 rounded-full border-2 border-[#0A0A0A]/10 bg-transparent text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-[#0A0A0A]

project_card.description: Soft yellow background, subtle rounded corners, full bleed imagery.
project_card.classes: bg-[#FFF6D6] rounded-3xl overflow-hidden hover:-translate-y-2 transition-transform duration-300 shadow-sm flex flex-col group

info_table.classes: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-8 border-y-2 border-[#0A0A0A]/10 py-12 mb-16

hero_portrait.description: Smiling woman wearing blue shirt (Use as Faraz Khan's portrait or about me photo)

project_1.description: Mobile app mockup for featured project 1

project_2.description: Mobile app mockup for featured project 2

project_3.description: Mobile app mockup for featured project 3

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a custom Sidebar component for the left navigation. The sidebar must have a width of 280px on desktop, background #E94B1F, containing the site logo, a navigation menu (Projects, About, Services, Contact) styled as yellow pill buttons with numbers inside, and social links at the bottom.
Offset the main content wrapper by the width of the sidebar (e.g., md:ml-[280px]). For mobile, implement a hamburger menu.
Use 'Playfair Display' font for headers to capture the bold, elegant serif look with circular dots/ligatures.
Use 'Outfit' font for all body and button text.
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on their role.
Create a Case Study page layout that features a full-bleed hero image followed by a 4-column info table (Client, Role, Services, Year) before the main project content.
Ensure generous padding throughout (py-24 to py-32) to give the warm, playful layout room to breathe.
The hero section should have an 'available for the project' status badge with a pulsing green dot.
Use custom Tailwind classes instead of shadcn Card components for the main layout to maintain the specific organic/warm aesthetic of the reference.
The portfolio grid should contain 6 project cards with the soft yellow (#FFF6D6) background and image placeholders provided.
